listOfQuestions.question: Which statement about "Storyboard" is correct?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Storyboard: A sequence of drawings or panels planning visual scenes
wrongAnswers: Fade: A gradual transition to or from an image or sound
Bitrate: The amount of data used per second of media
Export: Rendering a finished media file from a project

listOfQuestions.question: Which statement about "Shot list" is correct?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Shot list: A planned list of camera shots for production
wrongAnswers: Color grading: Adjusting color and tone for style and consistency
Timeline: The editing workspace where clips are arranged over time
Copyright: Legal protection for creative works

listOfQuestions.question: Which statement about "B-roll" is correct?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: B-roll: Supplementary footage used to support the main footage
wrongAnswers: White balance: Adjusting color so whites appear neutral
Layer: A separate visual or audio element stacked with others
Resolution: The detail of an image or video measured by pixel dimensions

listOfQuestions.question: Which statement about "Voice-over" is correct?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Voice-over: Narration recorded over visuals
wrongAnswers: Compression: Reducing media file size through encoding
Keyframe: A marker defining a property value at a point in time
Frame rate: How many video frames are shown each second

listOfQuestions.question: Which statement about "Cut" is correct?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Cut: A direct transition from one shot to another
wrongAnswers: Codec: Software or method used to encode and decode media
Mask: A shape used to hide or reveal part of a layer
Aspect ratio: The proportional relationship between width and height
